PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT ?sponsor ?sponsorLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q73965 p:P859 ?sponsorStatement .
  ?sponsorStatement ps:P859 ?sponsor .
  ?sponsorStatement pq:P580 ?startTime .
  ?sponsorStatement pq:P582 ?endTime .
  ?sponsor rdfs:label ?sponsorLabel .

  FILTER(YEAR(?startTime) <= 2020 &&(YEAR(?endTime) >= 2020 || ! BOUND(?endTime)))
}
